Metadata.title: Fleurizz — Fresh flowers delivered every month
Metadata.description: Subscribe and gift a seasonal bouquet every month to the person you love. Simple, elegant, automatic.

Hero.titleLine2: You don't even think about it.
Hero.subtitle: A seasonal bouquet, crafted by an artisan florist, delivered every month to the person you love.

HowItWorks.title: Three steps. Zero effort.
HowItWorks.step1Desc: A monthly subscription, at a pace that suits you.
HowItWorks.step2Desc: Every month, an artisan florist creates a unique seasonal bouquet.
HowItWorks.step3Desc: Delivered right to her door. You don't have to do a thing.

WhyFleurizz.title: The gesture that matters, automated.
WhyFleurizz.reason2Desc: Fresh flowers, crafted by artisans, never the same.
WhyFleurizz.reason3Desc: Straight to her door, on the date you choose.
WhyFleurizz.reason4Desc: No need to think about it. We take care of everything.

Testimonials.quote1: My girlfriend looks forward to her bouquet every month now. Best decision ever.
Testimonials.quote2: Simple, elegant, and she loves it. Highly recommend.

Newsletter.pageDesc: Leave us your email and we'll let you know as soon as Fleurizz is available.
Newsletter.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.
Newsletter.firstnameMax: First name must not exceed 50 characters.
Newsletter.consentRequired: You must accept the privacy policy.
Newsletter.consentText: I agree to receive emails from Fleurizz. See our
Newsletter.successDesc: We'll be in touch very soon to finalise your subscription.

Legal.title: Legal notice
Legal.editorDesc: The website fleurizz.fr is published by Clément Baumann, natural person.
Legal.editorAddress: Address: 76 avenue du Général Leclerc, 94100 Saint-Maur-des-Fossés, France
Legal.hostDesc: The website is hosted by Vercel Inc.
Legal.hostAddress: Address: 440 N Barranca Ave, Covina, CA 91723, United States
Legal.ipDesc1: All content on the website fleurizz.fr (text, graphics, logo, icons, layout) is the exclusive property of Clément Baumann, unless otherwise stated. Any reproduction, representation, modification or exploitation, in whole or in part, of any nature whatsoever, is prohibited without prior written authorisation.
Legal.ipDesc2: The Fleurizz brand, along with its logo and associated graphic elements, are the property of Clément Baumann. Any unauthorised use constitutes infringement punishable under intellectual property law.
Legal.liabilityDesc1: The website fleurizz.fr is provided as-is. Clément Baumann strives to ensure the accuracy of the information published, but cannot guarantee completeness or the absence of errors. Use of the information provided is at the user's own risk.
Legal.liabilityDesc2: Clément Baumann cannot be held liable for service interruptions, whether voluntary (maintenance) or involuntary (failure, force majeure).
Legal.linksDesc: The website may contain links to third-party websites. Clément Baumann has no control over these websites and disclaims any responsibility for their content or their personal data protection practices.
Legal.lawDesc: These legal notices are governed by French law. In the event of a dispute, and after an attempt at amicable resolution, French courts shall have sole jurisdiction.

Privacy.title: Privacy policy
Privacy.intro: Fleurizz is committed to protecting the privacy of its users. This privacy policy describes the personal data collected via the website fleurizz.fr, the reasons for its collection, and the rights you have.
Privacy.controllerDesc: The data controller for personal data is:
Privacy.controllerAddress: 76 avenue du Général Leclerc, 94100 Saint-Maur-des-Fossés, France
Privacy.dataDirectEmail: Email address (required) — when subscribing to the newsletter
Privacy.dataDirectName: First name (optional) — when subscribing to the newsletter
Privacy.dataAutoDesc: We use Amplitude, an audience measurement service, which collects browsing data: pages viewed, interactions with the site (clicks, scrolling), device type, browser, and operating system.
Privacy.purposeNewsletterDesc: to inform you of the launch of Fleurizz and our news
Privacy.purposeAnalyticsDesc: to understand how the site is used in order to improve the user experience
Privacy.legalBasisNewsletterDesc: your consent, given during registration via the checkbox
Privacy.legalBasisAnalyticsDesc: our legitimate interest in understanding site usage
Privacy.retentionNewsletterDesc: retained until you unsubscribe or request deletion
Privacy.retentionAnalyticsDesc: retained for a maximum of 13 months, in accordance with CNIL recommendations
Privacy.recipientsDesc: Your data is accessible only to the following service providers, strictly within the scope of their services:
Privacy.transferDesc: Some data is transferred to the United States (Amplitude, Vercel). These transfers are governed by standard contractual clauses approved by the European Commission, ensuring an adequate level of protection for your data.
Privacy.rightsDesc: In accordance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR), you have the following rights:
Privacy.rightAccess: Right of access to your personal data
Privacy.rightErasure: Right to erasure of your data
Privacy.rightWithdraw: Right to withdraw your consent at any time
Privacy.rightsContact: To exercise these rights, contact us at
Privacy.rightsDelay: . We commit to responding within one month.
Privacy.rightsCnil: If you believe that the processing of your data does not comply with regulations, you may file a complaint with the CNIL:
Privacy.cookiesDesc1: The website uses cookies set by Amplitude for audience measurement purposes. These cookies allow us to identify your browser and track your journey on the site anonymously. They are retained for a maximum of 13 months.
Privacy.cookiesDesc2: You can disable cookies at any time in your browser settings. Disabling cookies does not prevent you from browsing the site.
Privacy.changesDesc: We reserve the right to modify this privacy policy at any time. In the event of a substantial change, a notification will be displayed on the site. The date of the last update is shown at the top of this page.
